title: rpm: add attr as dependency for podman-tests
body:
Since commit 06c103469d we are using getfattr in system tests, that caused failures in gating tests[1] as getfattr was not installed. So add attr as dependency.

[1] https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/d93b6849-e526-46e9-a7c3-874bad4217a9/work-tests.yml8_p4nfkf/tests-n75vnz0u/test.podman-root.bats.log

a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

@lsm5 PTAL, not sure if you have looked at the gating results so far but I noticed this one the the fc42 results, looks like this is the only failure so we should be in good shape for the final release once this is backported.

@Luap99: once the present PR merges, I will cherry-pick it on top of `v5.4` in a new PR and assign it to you.
